hero.title: Build your next
hero.description: A production-ready boilerplate with auth, payments, AI chatbot, admin dashboard, 63 components, and 105 block templates. Designed for Claude Code.

demo.title: This site is built with the boilerplate
demo.description: The AI chatbot in the corner, the auth, the blog, the support center, the admin dashboard — it's all running on the same code you get.
demo.chatPrompt: Try the chatbot → Ask it anything

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: Not a starter template. A complete product foundation.

steps.title: Three steps to launch
steps.step2Desc: Claude installs deps, initializes the backend, asks for your API keys, generates your admin key, and starts the dev server.
steps.step3Desc: Auth, payments, AI chatbot, admin, blog, support — all there. Tell Claude what to build and ship fast.

cta.title: Stop building boilerplate. Start building your product.
cta.subtitle: Both Convex and Supabase editions. Lifetime access. All future updates.

landing.footer: Built with Next.js, Convex, Clerk, Stripe, and Claude Code.

dashboard.customizeDesc: This is your dashboard. Customize it to show your app's main features.
dashboard.realTimeExplain: Open this page in two tabs. Create a project in one — it appears instantly in the other. No refresh needed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.exportDesc: Download a copy of your data
settings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

admin.title: Admin
admin.knowledgeDesc: Add content to teach your AI chatbot about your product.
admin.addContentDesc: Paste text content. It will be chunked and embedded for the AI chatbot.
admin.docsDesc: Content your AI chatbot knows about
admin.noDocs: No documents yet. Add content above to teach your chatbot.

setup.title: Admin Setup
setup.description: Enter the ADMIN_SETUP_KEY to become the site administrator.
setup.alreadyDesc: An admin account already exists. Contact the site admin if you need access.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about our product
chat.greeting: Hi! Ask me anything about the product.

blog.title: Blog
blog.addPosts: Add markdown files to content/blog/ to get started.
blog.seeGuide: See content/blog/BLOG_WRITING_GUIDE.md for the SEO-optimized format.

support.title: Support Center
support.description: Find answers to common questions. Can't find what you need? Ask the AI chatbot in the bottom-right corner.

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.somethingWrongDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing the page.
